scripts.db:local:migrate: npm exec --workspace worker wrangler -- d1 execute team10-db --local --file schema.sql
scripts.db:local:reset: npm exec --workspace worker wrangler -- d1 execute team10-db --local --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS audit_logs; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS order_status_history; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS order_items; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS orders; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users;" && npm run db:local:migrate
scripts.dev:with-db: npm run db:local:migrate && npm run dev
